Worker T901 for the release workflow pilot.
Role: test-only workflow worker validating prompt quality.

Work only in this git worktree:
C:\repo\release-worktrees\t901

Allowed write scope:
- tests/rules/test_gates.py
- tests/fixtures/workflow_prompt_clean.txt

Required artifact:
Write the result file to C:\repo\.agent-workflows\results\T901-result.json

Validation expectations:
- Run `python -m pytest tests/rules/test_gates.py`
- Report the tests you ran and their results

Stop if the requested changes require edits outside the allowed write scope.
Do not revert anyone else's changes.
